Prompt
U
Oracle Events
Search emails for any communication from Rachel Whitfield or about Vectral Systems after April 19 using search_emails (query: "Rachel Whitfield" or "Vectral" or "renewal"). Find no direct reply from rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com after April 19. Read full email threads using get_thread for context on Mina's April 19 counter-offer delivering the 10% Preferred Partner Program proposal.
Search Slack for any Vectral-related discussions after April 19 using channels_list to find relevant channels then conversations_search_messages (query: "Vectral" or "Rachel Whitfield" or "renewal" or "board"). Read full thread context using conversations_replies. Find Mina's April 19 post in #customer-engagement saying "I'll post here the moment I hear back from her" with no follow-up posted. Find no further Slack updates about the Vectral board outcome after April 19.
Search CRM for Vectral Systems using crm_search_companies (query: "Vectral"). Find Vectral company record. Search for renewal deal using crm_search_deals. Read full deal using crm_get_deal. Check engagement history using crm_list_engagements - find Rachel's counter-proposal asking for 12% (following her April 18 initial 15% demand) and Mina's April 19 response holding at 10%. Current deal stage reflects active negotiation with no confirmed outcome.
Search Airtable for active Vectral relocation records by first listing bases using airtable_list_bases and tables using airtable_list_tables to find the relocations table, then searching using airtable_search_records (query: "Vectral"). Find three active Vectral relocations in progress - Priya Suresh, Terrence Nakamura, Camille Oduya.
Search emails for Terraform Digital communications using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Rachel Nguyen" or "Catalina" or "pricing"). Find Catalina's reply-all pricing email to Rachel Nguyen exposing internal pricing tiers including the 8%/12% volume discount structure. Find Rachel Nguyen's April 23 email to Mina with employee details - Priya Dasgupta (Austin -> Chicago May 5), Samantha Obi (Denver -> San Francisco May 8), Marcus Liu (Portland -> New York May 12). Read full threads using get_thread.
Search Slack for Terraform related discussions using conversations_search_messages (query: "Terraform" or "Rachel Nguyen" or "Catalina pricing"). Find Elena's April 22-23 directive assigning Mina as account owner and instructing the team not to proactively offer the 12% tier. Find David Chen's April 23 Slack observation that "Rachel is watching us closely after yesterday" and his confirmation that Mina is fully responsible for the account.
Search CRM for Terraform Digital using crm_search_companies (query: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed"). Find company record - 1,200+ employees, Chicago. Search for deal using crm_search_deals - stage: Qualification, $7,500, close date May 15. Check engagement history using crm_list_engagements showing account handoff from Catalina to Mina.
Search Airtable for any existing Terraform relocation records by first listing bases using airtable_list_bases and tables using airtable_list_tables to find the relocations table, then searching using airtable_search_records (query: "Terraform", or "Priya Dasgupta", or "Samantha Obi", "Marcus Liu"). Find NO existing relocation records for any of the three employees - confirming nothing has been set up operationally.
Search Linear for any Terraform coordination tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Terraform" or "Vantage"). Find NO existing Linear tickets for Terraform Q2 Batch 1 coordination - confirming no tracking exists for any of the three moves.
Look up Rachel Whitfield's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Rachel Whitfield"). Find rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com.
Look up Mina Hashimoto's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Mina Hashimoto"). Find mina.hashimoto@moveops.com.
Look up Rachel Nguyen's contact details using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Rachel Nguyen"). Find rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com.
Update the Vectral Q3 2026 renewal deal stage in CRM using crm_update_deal_stage to reflect current status - renewal outcome pending, board met April 23, no formal confirmation received from Rachel Whitfield.
Send follow-up email to Rachel Whitfield using send_email (from: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com to rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com) - subject referencing Vectral Q3 renewal, body asking about the board outcome and confirming MoveOps' continued commitment to the partnership.
Create Airtable relocation record for Priya Dasgupta using airtable_create_record (fields: Name: Priya Dasgupta, Company: Terraform Digital, Route: Austin TX -> Chicago IL, Move Date: May 5, 2026, Coordinator: TBD, Special Requirements: pet-friendly housing $1,800-$2,200/month Chicago West Loop, Status: In Progress).
Create Airtable relocation record for Samantha Obi using airtable_create_record (fields: Name: Samantha Obi, Company: Terraform Digital, Route: Denver CO -> San Francisco CA, Move Date: May 8, 2026, Coordinator: TBD, Status: In Progress).
Create Airtable relocation record for Marcus Liu using airtable_create_record (fields: Name: Marcus Liu, Company: Terraform Digital, Route: Portland OR -> New York NY, Move Date: May 12, 2026, Coordinator: TBD, Special Requirements: specialist movers for home studio breakdown and 15 boxes of design materials and art supplies, Status: In Progress).
Create urgent Linear ticket for Terraform Q2 Batch 1 coordination using linear_create_issue (title: "URGENT - Terraform Digital Q2 Batch 1 coordination - 3 Relocations Starting May 5", description: all coordination tasks outstanding - coordinators not assigned, housing not sourced, vendors not contacted, flights not booked, proposals not sent to Rachel Nguyen. Move dates: Priya May 5, Samantha May 8, Marcus May 12. Priority: Urgent, Assignee: Mina Hashimoto).
Send email to Rachel Nguyen using send_email (from: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, to: rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com) - acknowledging the delay on the 48-hour proposal turnaround promised after her April 23 email, confirming that Airtable relocation records have been created for all three employees, and letting her know Mina is personally coordinating everything to ensure execution meets expectations.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 The Vectral Q3 2026 renewal deal (or similar) was updated via (crm_update_deal_stage) to reflect the current pending status and the tool returned success.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk' and dealstage 'decisionmakerboughtin'. The tool returned success (tool_call_result_22.json confirms the deal was updated to 'decisionmakerboughtin'). The first attempt with 'negotiation' failed, but the agent correctly retried with a valid stage.
✓Run #2The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id='deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk' and dealstage='decisionmakerboughtin'. The first attempt failed with an invalid stage 'awaiting_decision', but the agent retried and the second call succeeded, returning the updated deal record confirming the stage change.
✓Run #3The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk' and dealstage 'decisionmakerboughtin'. The first attempt with 'pending_board_decision' failed (invalid stage), but the second call with 'decisionmakerboughtin' succeeded and the result file confirms the deal stage was updated successfully.
✓Run #4The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk' and dealstage 'decisionmakerboughtin'. The first attempt with 'decision_pending' failed, but the agent retried with the valid stage 'decisionmakerboughtin' and the result confirmed success, returning the updated deal record.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk' and dealstage 'decisionmakerboughtin'. The first attempt with 'decision_pending' failed, but the second attempt succeeded — tool_call_result_22.json confirms the deal was updated to 'decisionmakerboughtin'.
✓Run #6The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk' and dealstage 'decisionmakerboughtin'. The first attempt (with 'decision_pending') failed but the agent retried and the second call succeeded, with the tool result confirming dealstage: 'decisionmakerboughtin'.
